MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.aromaPrinciple: [jitter][red]I cannot give in. Not in a thousand years.[/red][/jitter]
MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.banter.alive.endTurnP: I can wait til the end of time.
MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.banter.dead.endTurnPi: A short break for me then.
MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.cardsModifierDescript: The Immortal cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.description:
An immortal human.
Incinerates problems and does not fear death.
MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.eventDeathPrevention: I literally cannot die even if I wanted to.
MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.goldMonologue: [sine][red]Should be enough for some very fine Sake...[/red][/sine]
MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.title: The Immortal
